title: The Clockwork Vault
description: Beneath the nexus, a vault of brass gears guards a stolen secret. Get inside, take the master gear, get out — without breaking the clock.
author: Terminal Quest team

steps.description: Solve the logic gate puzzle to wake the vault
Carry at least one key fragment for leverage
Reach level 3 first - the gears spin too fast for novices
Approach the vault after dusk (turn >= 12 in current cycle)
Take the master gear (recorded as `master-gear` in your inventory)

clean.text: You replaced the master gear with a perfect copy. The clock keeps time, and so do you.

rough.text: You smashed the lock and ran. Half the city's watches will be late tomorrow because of you.

clever.text: You took the gear, slid the bolt, and walked back out the way you came. Nothing else stirred.
